captionTitleStyle:
width: 'fit-content',
      height: '20%',
      left: '50px',
      borderBottom: '5px solid #4096ff',
      fontSize: '2rem'
optionContainerStyle:
{
    display: 'flex',
  flexDirection: 'column',
  justifyContent: 'space-evenly',
  width: '100%',
  height: '100%',
  position: 'relative',
  overflow: 'hidden',
  gap: '10%'
}

normalStyle:
{
    pointerEvents: 'auto',
    cursor: 'pointer',
    position: 'relative',
    width: '30%',
    left: '70%',
    backgroundColor: '#555',
    display: 'flex',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    alignItems: 'center',
    borderRadius: '10px',
    fontSize: '2rem',
    color: 'white',
    height: '100%'
}
